semantic.role: Test suite for the PostCommitDerivationTask orchestrating reverse indexing, aggregation, knowledge graph, and view derivation tasks in the correct sequential order.
responsibilities: Verify that PostCommitDerivationTask.execute() triggers ReverseIndexingTask, AggregationTask, KnowledgeGraphTask, and ViewDerivationTask in the correct order.
Ensure that ViewService is correctly invoked after view derivation with VIEW_DEFINITIONS.
Validate that task telemetry state is initialized before execution.
Provide coverage for the post-commit derivation pipeline orchestration logic.
outOfScope: Implementation details of the individual sub-tasks (ReverseIndexingTask, AggregationTask, KnowledgeGraphTask, ViewDerivationTask).
Public API surface of the system (CLI commands, MCP tools, configuration loading).
Error handling or recovery logic inside the production tasks.
invariants: Test file must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts suffix per architectural rule test-file-suffix.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide automated regression coverage for the post-commit derivation pipeline that ensures cross-cutting indexing, aggregation, and view generation steps execute in dependency order.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of refactoring that removed legacy CLI aliases, rebuilt documentation, and fixed schema/tests; this test file was updated to align with the new pipeline dependencies.

English.role: Test suite for the PostCommitDerivationTask that orchestrates reverse indexing, aggregation, knowledge graph, and view derivation tasks in the correct sequential order.
responsibilities: Verify that PostCommitDerivationTask.execute() triggers ReverseIndexingTask, AggregationTask, KnowledgeGraphTask, and ViewDerivationTask in the expected order.
Ensure that ViewService is correctly called after view derivation with the predefined VIEW_DEFINITIONS.
Validate that task telemetry state is properly initialized before execution begins.
Provide comprehensive regression coverage for the post-commit derivation orchestration logic.
outOfScope: Implementation details of the individual sub-tasks (ReverseIndexingTask, AggregationTask, KnowledgeGraphTask, ViewDerivationTask).
Public API surface of the system (CLI commands, MCP tools, configuration loading).
Runtime configuration or environment setup specifics.
Error handling or recovery logic inside the production tasks.
